title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Syntel India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
